assessment.note: He names ongoing uncertainty about what good looks like week to week, which signals mild strain; also reveals a clear clarity issue worth probing next.

new_queue.label: What good looks like
new_queue.name: When you say 'what good looks like' — what's most unclear week to week?
new_queue.description: Clarifies the specific success-bar uncertainty he just named.

new_queue.label: Energy read
new_queue.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?
new_queue.description: Separates energy from output; avoids leading with 'is something wrong'.

new_queue.label: Asking for help
new_queue.name: What makes it easier or harder to ask for help here?
new_queue.description: Explores whether he feels safe raising confusion or frustration early.

new_queue.label: Team setup friction
new_queue.name: What's making the role harder than it needs to be?
new_queue.description: Identifies process, access, or review friction the manager can remove.

new_queue.label: Manager leverage
new_queue.name: What's one thing I could change that would remove friction for you?
new_queue.description: Directs the conversation toward actionable manager support and team setup changes.

new_queue.label: Next step
new_queue.name: Given what we've talked about, what's the first thing you want to shift before we next meet?
new_queue.description: Closes by turning the conversation into a concrete next move.
